content: One paper are accepted to CVPR 2026, see you in Denver!
Two papers are accepted to CHI 2026, see you in Barcelona!
One paper is accepted to IEEE VR 2026 TVCG Journal Track, see you in Daegu!
One paper is accepted to NeurIPS 2025, see you in San Diego!
Two E-tech Demos and one poster is accepted to Siggraph Asia 2025, congrats!
One paper is accepted to ACM MM 2025, see you in Dublin!
I joined the Department of Computer Science, Institute of Science Tokyo as an Associate Professor!
One paper is accepted to CHI 2025, see you in Yokohama!
One paper is accepted to UIST 2024, see you in Pittsburgh!
One paper is accepted to WACV 2024, see you in Arizona!
One paper is accepted to IEEE VR 2024, see you in Orlando!
One paper is accepted to ISMAR 2023, see you in Sydney!
Two papers are accepted to CHI 2023, see you in Hamburg!
One paper is accepted to WACV 2023, see you in Hawaii!
Defended my Ph.D. dissertation and obtained my Ph.D. degree!
Two papers are accepted to AHs 2022, Congrats!
One paper is accepted to IEEE VR 2021 TVCG Journal Track, Congrats!
One paper is accepted to UIST 2020, Congrats!
Honored to receive JSPS Gakushin DC1 Fellowship!
One paper is accepted to UIST 2019, Congrats!
Starting my internship at Sony Computer Science Laboratories (Sony CSL)
One paper is accepted to WACV 2019, Congrats!
Our Demo on VR Ski Coach received the Best Demo award at IEEE VR 2018, Congrats!
